follow_on_task_shapes: reject literal independent microservice layer as doctrinally invalid
direct spec addendum for internal substrate routing under C45/C47/C42/C39/C18/C22
new internal-only full pipeline subsystem if capacity arbitration must become a distinct authority
cross-spec planning/addendum path if the objective is kept but formalized without minting a standalone subsystem
new_semantic_authority_test.rationale: The swarm converged that the literal independent microservice-layer frame is invalid under current authority, but a narrower internal capacity-governance problem remains partially open.

notes: Every operator-named authority surface was reviewed and incorporated into the ideation convergence.
The literal historical framing is blocked most strongly by C36, C45, C39, and T-300.

surface_rows.current_authority_summary: Owns sovereign route compilation, execution-mode locking, native-versus-leased posture, provider scrubbing, and route-level provenance.
surface_rows.reasoning_impact: Blocked any peer or externalized inference layer and shifted viable options toward an internal substrate consumed beneath C45.

surface_rows.current_authority_summary: Owns continuation, execution priming, and lawful runtime handoff while preserving C23 as runtime-start authority.
surface_rows.reasoning_impact: Prevented any option that grants ambient execution authority or shadow-lease behavior to an inference fabric.

surface_rows.current_authority_summary: Owns model ingestion, adaptation, quarantine, promotion, and leased-to-native migration doctrine.
surface_rows.reasoning_impact: Showed model lifecycle authority is already owned, so any new concept must consume promoted model families rather than duplicate Forge.

surface_rows.current_authority_summary: Owns membrane-bound external exposure and rejects generic gateway or direct raw model access posture.
surface_rows.reasoning_impact: Forced all viable options to remain internal-only and membrane-scoped.

surface_rows.current_authority_summary: Owns the economics of sovereign compute, leased cognition, and Forge adaptation/quarantine.
surface_rows.reasoning_impact: Supported the objective's efficiency rationale while arguing against a duplicate independent platform plane.

surface_rows.current_authority_summary: Owns rollout sequencing, operational waves, and implementation decomposition across current architecture surfaces.
surface_rows.reasoning_impact: Showed the program can absorb capacity-governance work, but the literal microservice framing is not the right sequencing unit.

surface_rows.current_authority_summary: Owns delegated sampling, streaming, realized model provenance, and default-deny semantics for tool authority.
surface_rows.reasoning_impact: Eliminated the need for a new inference protocol family and kept any viable solution on existing message semantics.

surface_rows.current_authority_summary: Fixes Alternative C as the only forward authority and blocks revival of old-stack service-plane assumptions.
surface_rows.reasoning_impact: Ruled out literal restoration of the historical blueprint and forced redesign into an Alternative C-native internal concept.
